pi_items.source: Task setup and export scripts explicitly remove and look for this exact filename.
setup_task.sh and setup_artifactory.sh check for the default creation of example-repo-local.
verifier.py checks for this substring, which matches JFrog Artifactory's standard routing structure for repository access.
Defined as ARTIFACTORY_URL in task_utils.sh and setup_artifactory.sh, matching the port exposed in docker-compose.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to use the 'Set Me Up' tool in Artifactory (running at http://localhost:8082) to generate a Maven settings snippet for the default repository 'example-repo-local'. The result must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/maven_settings.xml' containing valid XML with the repository URL path 'artifactory/example-repo-local'. The artifacts provided in the environment are genuine files downloaded from Maven Central.
